title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: download, build and run Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma and other large language models locally with a simple CLI and REST API.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for the Ollama server; works in Node and browsers.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client library that wraps the Ollama REST API; sync & async support.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package letting you use any Ollama-hosted model as an LLM or embedder.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Full-featured, open-source ChatGPT-style web interface for Ollama models (formerly Ollama-WebUI).

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama; provides synchronous & asynchronous APIs and model management.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Convenience CLI wrapper (in Go) that adds prompt templates, conversation history and markdown rendering.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Experimental GitHub Copilot-like code-completion service powered by Ollama models.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG template using Ollama embeddings + Chroma vector store + Streamlit frontend.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration that enables Ollama models as generators or embedders in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-n8n-node
summary: Community n8n node to call Ollama models inside no-code workflows.

title: ollama-rs
summary: Rust crate providing strongly-typed async bindings to the Ollama REST API.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: Community-maintained C# / .NET client for Ollama with async streaming support.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-host Discord bot that answers prompts using any Ollama model.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart to deploy Ollama server and models on Kubernetes clusters.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that spins up Ollama as a service in CI pipelines for testing LLM features.

title: ollama-elixir
summary: Elixir wrapper around Ollama’s REST API with GenServer-backed process management.

title: ollama-slackbot
summary: Lightweight Slack bot server (Node) that replies in threads using Ollama models.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that adds AI autocomplete & summarization via local Ollama models.

title: ollama-rust-embeddings
summary: Example repo showing how to generate embeddings with Ollama and perform fast vector search in Rust.
